privileged_info_summary: The food.gdt dataset is real data from the Principles of Econometrics (5th Edition) containing 40 household observations of weekly food expenditure (food_exp) and weekly income. OLS regression yields intercept ≈83.4 and slope ≈10.2. WLS regression with weight=1/income yields intercept ≈78.7 (within expected range 76.0-82.0) and slope ≈10.5 (within expected range 10.3-10.8). The weight variable wt is correctly specified as 1/income to address heteroskedasticity.
